headline: What's going on in today's pre-market session: S&P500 movers
summary: Before the US market kicks off on Friday, let's examine the pre-market session and unveil the notable performers among the S&P500 top gainers and losers.

headline: Workday to Announce Fiscal 2027 First Quarter Financial Results on May 21, 2026
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), the enterprise AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, will announce its fiscal 2027 first quarter financial results after market close on Thursday, May 21, 2026. The company will host a conference call at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time / 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to review its financial results and business outlook.
